'''âzh-t-f''' ('''kazhataf''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:monocrop|monocrop]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-t-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:monocrop|monocrop]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âzh-t-f
|-
! Lemma
| kazhataf
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhataf|thizhataf]] || [[word:jizhataf|jizhataf]] || [[word:shizhataf|shizhataf]] || [[word:kizhataf|kizhataf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzhataf|thuthuzhataf]] || [[word:jujuzhataf|jujuzhataf]] || [[word:shushuzhataf|shushuzhataf]] || [[word:kukuzhataf|kukuzhataf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzhataf|thuzhataf]] || [[word:juzhataf|juzhataf]] || [[word:shuzhataf|shuzhataf]] || [[word:kuzhataf|kuzhataf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzhataf|thuzhataf]] || [[word:juzhataf|juzhataf]] || [[word:shuzhataf|shuzhataf]] || [[word:kuzhataf|kuzhataf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezhataf|thezhataf]] || [[word:jezhataf|jezhataf]] || [[word:shezhataf|shezhataf]] || [[word:kezhataf|kezhataf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozhataf|thothozhataf]] || [[word:jojozhataf|jojozhataf]] || [[word:shoshozhataf|shoshozhataf]] || [[word:kokozhataf|kokozhataf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozhataf|thozhataf]] || [[word:jozhataf|jozhataf]] || [[word:shozhataf|shozhataf]] || [[word:kozhataf|kozhataf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozhataf|thozhataf]] || [[word:jozhataf|jozhataf]] || [[word:shozhataf|shozhataf]] || [[word:kozhataf|kozhataf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzhataf|thĂŠzhataf]] || [[word:jĂŠzhataf|jĂŠzhataf]] || [[word:shĂŠzhataf|shĂŠzhataf]] || [[word:kĂŠzhataf|kĂŠzhataf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazhataf|thathazhataf]] || [[word:jajazhataf|jajazhataf]] || [[word:shashazhataf|shashazhataf]] || [[word:kakazhataf|kakazhataf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazhataf|thazhataf]] || [[word:jazhataf|jazhataf]] || [[word:shazhataf|shazhataf]] || [[word:kazhataf|kazhataf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazhataf|thazhataf]] || [[word:jazhataf|jazhataf]] || [[word:shazhataf|shazhataf]] || [[word:kazhataf|kazhataf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazhataf|shazhataf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazhataf|goshazhataf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazhataf|gokishazhataf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazhatafnĂŒ|shazhatafnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazhatafnknĂŒ|goshazhatafnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhatafnĂŒ|gokishazhatafnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazhatafshĂ«|shazhatafshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazhatafnkshĂ«|goshazhatafnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazhatafshĂ«|gokishazhatafshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhatafro|shazhatafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhatafnkro|goshazhatafnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhatafro|gokishazhatafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhatafmu|shazhatafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhatafnkmu|goshazhatafnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhatafmu|gokishazhatafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazhatafsher|shazhatafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazhatafnksher|goshazhatafnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazhatafsher|gokishazhatafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazhatafng|shazhatafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazhatafnkng|goshazhatafnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazhatafng|gokishazhatafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazhatafya|shazhatafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazhatafnkya|goshazhatafnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazhatafya|gokishazhatafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazhatafyam|shazhatafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazhatafnkyam|goshazhatafnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazhatafyam|gokishazhatafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhatafnĂŒshĂ«|shazhatafnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhatafnknĂŒshĂ«|goshazhatafnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhatafnĂŒshĂ«|gokishazhatafnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhatafnĂŒro|shazhatafnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhatafnknĂŒro|goshazhatafnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhatafnĂŒro|gokishazhatafnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhatafnĂŒmu|shazhatafnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhatafnknĂŒmu|goshazhatafnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhatafnĂŒmu|gokishazhatafnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhatafshĂ«nĂŒ|shazhatafshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhatafnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshazhatafnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhatafshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishazhatafshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhatafshĂ«ro|shazhatafshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhatafnkshĂ«ro|goshazhatafnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhatafshĂ«ro|gokishazhatafshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhatafshĂ«mu|shazhatafshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhatafnkshĂ«mu|goshazhatafnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhatafshĂ«mu|gokishazhatafshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhatafronĂŒ|shazhatafronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhatafnkronĂŒ|goshazhatafnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhatafronĂŒ|gokishazhatafronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhatafroshĂ«|shazhatafroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhatafnkroshĂ«|goshazhatafnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhatafroshĂ«|gokishazhatafroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhatafromu|shazhatafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhatafnkromu|goshazhatafnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhatafromu|gokishazhatafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhatafmunĂŒ|shazhatafmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhatafnkmunĂŒ|goshazhatafnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhatafmunĂŒ|gokishazhatafmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhatafmushĂ«|shazhatafmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhatafnkmushĂ«|goshazhatafnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhatafmushĂ«|gokishazhatafmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhatafmuro|shazhatafmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhatafnkmuro|goshazhatafnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhatafmuro|gokishazhatafmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
